heroEyebrow: Research software · applied ML · technical notes
heroTitle: Research software and applied machine-learning studies.
heroBody: A compact record of projects, notebooks, screenshots, and notes. The emphasis is on what was built, what problem it addressed, and what evidence or artifact remains available to inspect.

heroLinks.label: Refract
heroLinks.description: Research software for reading papers, saving evidence, comparing sources, and keeping analysis inside one working session.

heroLinks.label: Alzheimer MRI study
heroLinks.description: A notebook-based MRI classification study with visible data inspection, preprocessing, CNN training, and comparison.

heroLinks.label: Reliability essay

recommendationsNote: Resume and formal references are available as supporting material.

modules.title: Common thread
modules.markdown: The projects differ in format, but they share a concern with traceability. Refract asks how research software can keep reading, evidence, comparison, and analysis from breaking into disconnected tools. The Alzheimer MRI study asks how a notebook can preserve the experimental sequence of a medical imaging workflow. The writing records the design and evaluation questions behind those artifacts.
